center.name: 麥哲倫省
center.summary: 麥哲倫省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Chucao tapaculo，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in central Chile and adjacent Argentina; it has also been recorded in Chile's Magallanes Province.{{cite web |url=http://www.worldbirdnames.org/ |title=IOC World Bird List (v 11.1) |last1=Gill |first1= F
